packageRules.description: cargo-cooldown-check: custom hermit source, point Renovate at its index release
Extra cooldown for majors (matches Dependabot semver-major-days: 30)

ariadne: skip the 0.3–0.6 range — the 0.6 rewrite was deferred; post-0.6 releases contain the fixes needed to migrate, so allow those through. Also keep 0.2.x patches open since that's the currently pinned branch.
@types/node: no automatic major bumps — Node majors are upgraded manually and only to even LTS releases (e.g. 24 → 26). Minor/patch within the current major flow through normally.

pnpm overrides exist to patch CVEs on transitive deps that pin old majors. Block major bumps on the override target — going past the consuming dep's compatibility window forces it onto an incompatible API and breaks at runtime.
iai-callgrind: disabled pending migration to gungraun (issue #1690); crate was renamed upstream
cargo: group minor/patch; majors stay individual
cargo: pre-1.0 crates treat 0.x→0.y as major (Cargo semver convention); ungroup from minor/patch so they land as individual PRs
npm: group minor/patch; majors stay individual
pip (Pipenv): group minor/patch; majors stay individual
hermit (toolchain): group minor/patch; majors stay individual
dockerfile: group minor/patch; majors stay individual
Benchmark comparison deps: grouped so version changes that affect perf baselines land in one PR. Must come after per-manager grouping rules so this groupName takes precedence.

node: keep engines.node (package.json) and Hermit-pinned Node in lockstep — group across npm + hermit so a Node bump always lands in one PR. Must come after per-manager grouping rules so this groupName takes precedence.
strum: used in CST hot path via derive macros; flag for perf review

bencher_cli: handled by customManagers entry below that tracks release tags — disable built-in cargo digest updates so the two don't fight. Note: matches on depName (Cargo.toml key), not packageName (which is the git URL for git-source deps).

customManagers.description: Track bencher_cli by release tag, not default-branch HEAD. Regex pairs with the two marker lines in Cargo.toml — if you reformat those, update this pattern too.

packageRules.description: Allow vulnerability fix PRs for iai-callgrind which is otherwise disabled
